description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit with a light wood finish and a smooth, gray stone or laminate top surface. The front features two distinct sections: the left side has wide, horizontal shelves ideal for storing flat items, while the right side has narrower, more closely spaced shelves. The back is a solid wood panel, and the sides are plain, showing the thickness of the wood panels and the depth of the shelves. The open front design allows for easy access to stored items, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The construction appears sturdy, with no visible doors or handles, and the shelves are fixed in place.
description: A light wood shelving unit with a gray stone or laminate top, featuring open shelves in two sections for accessible storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sections of open shelves, with the left side having wider shelves and the right side narrower shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wood panels, with shelves visible through the open side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Top view highlighting the smooth, gray stone or laminate surface covering the entire top of the unit.
